examples: He hopped closer and closer and looked at Ben Weatherstaff more and more engagingly.
If the scale of his ambition is dazzling, at the heart of his plan is an invention which is engagingly simple.
But the great physicist was also engagingly simple, trading ties and socks for mothy sweaters and sweatshirts.
Burstein warmly and engagingly renders Matt Friedman, the genial yet outspoken Jewish socialist accountant from St.
The harmony is, in places, arrestingly thick and hazy, the layering of motifs engagingly contrapuntal.
